_instructions.patient: Demographic information of the patient used for image rendering and metadata mapping.
_instructions.encounter_date: The date of the encounter in YYYY-MM-DD format.
_instructions.note: Multi-line clinical text that will be rendered onto the intake sheet as the OCR target.
_instructions.fields: Structured measurements matching the table on the intake sheet. Used as ground truth.
_instructions.trend_values: A list of float/integer values mapped to the embedded chart at the bottom of the intake sheet.

note:
HPI: Nora presents with mild exertional dyspnea.
Ejection fraction is evaluated via echocardiogram.
Ejection fraction = 32% (severe reduction).
No lower extremity edema noted.
Reconciliation of furosemide complete.
